notes:
Ember 1.8.1 — Ember Link as an installable iPad/tablet app (PWA)

• Add to Home Screen: open Ember Link in Safari on your iPad (or iPhone/Android), Share → Add to Home Screen, and it installs with the Ember icon and launches full-screen like a native app — no App Store needed. (A native iPad app can't control a computer due to iOS sandboxing, so this client is the right way to use an iPad with Ember.)
• iPad-optimised layout: roomier, centred design with a bigger mirror and larger touch targets on tablet-sized screens; iPadOS gives real fullscreen too.

Builds on 1.8.0's in-app Terminal + Parallel Agent Tasks, the 1.7.x voice/shortcut fixes, and 1.6.0's smarter local Ollama.
